TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: iyurupu kinaizuan a itua iyurasiya (Eurasia) a kadjunangan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua tja buru a kadjunangan mavan aicu a iyurupu (Europe) a kadjunangan. izua uta a tja siaya a awciu (pinairangan) taza iyurupu a kadjunanagan. a i pasanavalj avan cu a averika (Africa); a i pasakacedas mavan a asiya (Asia). == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: ijurupu kinaizuan a itua ijurasija (əurasia) a kaɉunaŋan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua ʦa buru a kaɉunaŋan mavan aiʦu a ijurupu (əurupə) a kaɉunaŋan. izua uta a ʦa siaja a awʦiu (pinairaŋan) taza ijurupu a kaɉunanagan. a i pasanavaʎ avan ʦu a avərika (a*riʦa); a i pasakaʦədas mavan a asija (asia). == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: iyurupu kinaizuan a itua iyurasiya (Eurasia) a kadjunangan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua tja buru a kadjunangan mavan aicu a iyurupu (Europe) a kadjunangan. izua uta a tja siaya a awciu (pinairangan) taza iyurupu a kadjunanagan. a i pasanavalj avan cu a averika (Africa); a i pasakacedas mavan a asiya (Asia). == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: ijurupu kinaizuan a itua ijurasija (əurasia) a kaɉunaŋan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua ʦa buru a kaɉunaŋan mavan aiʦu a ijurupu (əurupə) a kaɉunaŋan. izua uta a ʦa siaja a awʦiu (pinairaŋan) taza ijurupu a kaɉunanagan. a i pasanavaʎ avan ʦu a avərika (a*riʦa); a i pasakaʦədas mavan a asija (asia). == kaizuan ==
